title: Gentle Techniques for Calming an Overtired Toddler Before Sleep
description: Establishing a calming pre-sleep routine can transform your evenings. Start by dimming the lights and playing soft music to create a soothing ambiance. Engage your toddler with quiet activities like reading a book or building with blocks. You can also play a bedtime story in your own recorded voice, bringing comfort as they drift off. These methods help signal that it's time for sleep. Try recording your voice and let NinniTales bring your stories to life at bedtime. #CalmBeforeBed #ToddlerSleep #BedtimeTips
